_meta.note: Wave 5 domain->condition affinity map. Maps each of the 26 controlled mythology domains (docs/design/mythology-research-spec.md §4) to the 9 rulebook conditions (data/conditions.json). The patron boon economy uses this to skew WHICH conditions a patron's domain-aligned boons and rival-curses touch. Associations are thematic DESIGN affinities; any weighting is PLACEHOLDER (R14).
_meta.direction_note: Direction-agnostic: an affinity is a thematic link the systems may use to INFLICT (enemy/curse) OR to CURE/RESIST (boon), depending on the effect. e.g. sun_fire<->burn can mean a fire boon that applies burn OR a solar ward that clears chill.
_meta.empty_list_rule: A domain with no clean condition fit gets an empty list ON PURPOSE (owner: leave empty rather than force). Empty here does not mean the domain is unused — most such domains act on tags/affixes/hype, not on the 9 damaging conditions.

deferred.domain_tag_map: DEFERRED — needs the I-13 tag-effects layer, which is not built yet. Do not add a domain->tag map here until tag effects exist.
deferred.domain_affix_map: DEFERRED — needs the loot/affix families (character-sheet app has 27 affixes; the game side has not modelled affix families). Add when the affix layer lands.

war.rationale: The battlefield's two staple wounds: cutting/piercing (bleeding) and blunt-force trauma (crushed).

hunt.rationale: The kill draws blood — arrows, spears, and claws open wounds. (Hunter's-poison is thin across the corpus; kept to disease_poison.)

sea.rationale: Drowning (suffocation — the torso death-timer) and cold water (chilled).

sky_storm.rationale: Lightning strike modelled as burn (electrical/thermal); storm-force wind, hail, and hurled debris as crushed.

sun_fire.rationale: Solar fire — the canonical burn source (matches the Hephaestus forge/fire stub's tier_up_burn).

moon_night.rationale: The cold of night. (Lunacy/madness -> dissolution is carried by madness_dream, not duplicated here.)

earth_harvest.rationale: Fertility/growth/soil is a nurturing buff domain, not a damaging condition. Burial/rockfall could argue crushed, but that is forcing it — left empty per the empty-list rule.

death_underworld.rationale: The domain of endings and the underworld resonates with mind-collapse (dissolution = suffocation of the Mind). Note: engine 'death' is a body-condition endpoint, not a domain affinity.

wisdom.rationale: Knowledge domain — acts on information/prep boons, not on the 9 damaging conditions. (Its defensive tie to dissolution/Psychic resistance belongs to a future resist map.)

magic.rationale: Magic is a delivery mechanism, not a specific condition — a magic boon could carry any condition. Left empty rather than forcing one lane.

trickery.rationale: Deception/sleight-of-hand acts through tags, positioning, and exposure, not a damaging condition.

craft_forge.rationale: The forge's fire — the smith-gods (Hephaestus lineage) work in flame; forged-weapon boons carry burn.

healing.rationale: Healing REMOVES/RESISTS conditions rather than having an inflict-affinity. The boon economy applies it as a cure across conditions, not a single affinity.

love_beauty.rationale: Charm/allure acts on hype, tags, and the crowd payoff — not a damaging condition.

music_performance.rationale: Spectacle/Charm domain — drives hype gain and crowd payoff, not a condition (see patron-gods.md default #6).

luck_gambling.rationale: Fortune skews roll quality, tier odds, and windfalls — not a damaging condition. (These are the casino-nobility gods; flagged in research, not condition-bearing.)

wealth_commerce.rationale: Loot/comps/affix-roll quality — an economic buff domain, not a condition.

travel_speed.rationale: The toll of the road / forced march — over-travel leads to whole-body fatigue (exhausted). Mobility boons are the positive face of the same domain.

justice_oaths.rationale: Oath/contract domain — acts through favor/taboo and buy-out mechanics, not a damaging condition.

chaos.rationale: Too broad for one condition — chaos boons/curses could carry any of them. Left empty rather than forcing a single lane.

beasts_wild.rationale: Claws and fangs tear (bleeding); venomous beasts envenom (poison).

disease_poison.rationale: The plague lane: toxins (poison) and sepsis (infected). The rare disease_poison build (Beelzebub) lives here.

protection_home.rationale: Warding/hearth domain — prevents and resists rather than inflicts. Applied as ward/resist boons across conditions, not a single affinity.

poetry_story.rationale: Narrative/eloquence domain — feeds epithets, hype, and myth recreation, not a damaging condition.

madness_dream.rationale: Mind-unmaking and nightmare map directly to dissolution (suffocation of the Mind; Psychic resistance track).

time_fate.rationale: Fate/time domain — bends clocks, odds, and reversals; not a damaging condition of its own. Left empty rather than forcing one.
